accommodations.text: Provide captions or a transcript for all audio and video media.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide captions or a transcript for all audio and video media.

accommodations.text: Repeat and rephrase spoken directions on request.
accommodations.source_quote: Repeat and rephrase spoken directions on request.

accommodations.text: Seat with a clear line of sight to the face of the speaker.
accommodations.source_quote: Seat with a clear line of sight to the face of the speaker.

accommodations.text: Allow additional wait time for verbal responses.
accommodations.source_quote: Allow additional wait time for verbal responses.

accommodations.text: Provide 50% extended time on tests and long assignments.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide 50% extended time on tests and long assignments.

accommodations.text: Provide 25% extended time on timed assessments.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide 25% extended time on timed assessments.

accommodations.text: Provide a visual schedule for each class period.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide a visual schedule for each class period.

services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction: 100 minutes per week; 50 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Special education teacher.
Educational audiology consultation: 30 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 1 time monthly; provider: Educational audiologist.
Speech and language therapy: 60 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Speech-language pathologist.

goals.text: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Accepts a change in routine in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Priya will use correct past-tense verbs in structured sentences with 80% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Uses correct past-tense verbs with 50% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: Priya will use correct past-tense verbs in structured sentences with 80% accuracy.

goals.text: Layla will independently report FM system problems to the teacher in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Reports FM system problems with prompting in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Layla will independently report FM system problems to the teacher in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.

goals.text: Sofia will retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Retells a narrative with only a beginning in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Sofia will retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end in 4 of 5 opportunities.
